bio_short: I am Gurpratap Singh, a B.Tech Computer Science student, interested in learning modern technologies and eager to explore and learn more about it.
bio_long: Enthusiastic first-year B.Tech student with proficiency encompassing high-level Python development and modern web architectures, integrated with advanced database management in MySQL and PostgreSQL. Driven by a commitment to technical excellence, with a focus on architecting robust, high-performance systems that leverage cutting-edge full-stack technologies to solve complex industrial challenges.
